details.effect: [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] If there are at least 3 Hunter cards in your cemetery, select an enemy follower on the field. Change it into an amulet and give it "[act] [cost02]: Put this card into its owner's cemetery." (It keeps all existing abilities, including [evolve] and [feed].)
[act] [engage]: Deal 6 damage to each enemy leader with at least 10 defense.

Ward. [fanfare] Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. From among them, you may reveal up to 1 [forestcraft] follower and up to 1 [forestcraft] spell and add them to your hand. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order. Combo (3): Recover 3 play points.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve: Search your deck for a Hunter follower that costs 2 play points or less, put it onto your field, then shuffle your deck.

At the start of your end phase, an opponent chooses one of the following. (1) They can't draw a card during their next start phase. (2) They can't increase their maximum play points by 1 during their next start phase. (3) They can't play followers during their next main phase.
[quick] Select up to 2 Pixie followers on your field and put them into their owners' EX areas. If at least 1 Pixie follower was put into an EX area by this ability, give your leader [defense]+2.
[fanfare] Look at the top card of your deck. If it's a Hunter card, you may reveal it and add it to your hand.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Put 2 Puppet tokens into your EX area. Whenever a Puppet is put onto your field, give it [attack]+1 and Storm.
While this card is on your field, any Puppet you play costs 1 less. Whenever a Puppet is put onto your field, give it [attack]+1 and Storm.
Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it X damage. X equals its defense minus 1. If there are at least 3 Hunter cards in your cemetery, draw a card.
[fanfare] If there are at least 3 Hunter cards in your cemetery, give your leader [defense]+2.
[fanfare] Banish a card in your EX area: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Put a Puppet token into your EX area.
[lastwords] Select up to 1 Puppetry follower in your cemetery (including this one) and add it to your hand.
Ward. [fanfare] Put 2 Puppet tokens into your EX area.
[quick] The next time your leader would take damage this turn, it doesn't take damage.

[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [evolve] [cost00]: Evolve this follower. This ability can be activated if there are at least 10 cards in opponents' cemeteries. [fanfare] Each opponent puts the top 2 cards of their deck into their cemetery. [act] [cost08]: Select a card in an opponent's cemetery and play it for 0 play points.

On Evolve: Select a card in an opponent's cemetery and put it into your EX area. [act] [cost08]: Select a card in an opponent's cemetery and play it for 0 play points. If there are at least 10 cards in opponents' cemeteries, any card you play from the EX area costs 2 less.
[fanfare] Banish the top half of your deck (round up). Deal 4 damage to each enemy leader and enemy follower on the field. If at least 15 cards were banished by this ability, deal 8 damage instead.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Each opponent puts the top 2 cards of their deck into their cemetery. Then, if there are at least 10 cards in opponents' cemeteries, draw a card.
On Evolve: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.
At the start of your end phase, select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 4 damage to it and 2 damage to its leader.
Summon a Shield Guardian and Knight token. If there is an enemy follower that costs at least 6 play points on the field, give the summoned tokens [attack]+3/[defense]+3 and recover 2 play points.
Storm. Strike: Each opponent puts the top card of their deck into their cemetery. Then, if there are at least 10 cards in opponents' cemeteries, give this follower [attack]+2.
[fanfare] Discard a Commander card: Search your deck for a Commander card, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle your deck.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Whenever you play an amulet, select a follower on your field and give it [defense]+1.
On Evolve: Search your deck for an amulet, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle your deck. Whenever you play an amulet, select a follower on your field and give it [defense]+1.
[fanfare] Each opponent puts the top card of their deck into their cemetery. During your turn, whenever a card is put from an opponent's deck into the cemetery, give this follower [attack]+1.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select an enemy leader and deal it 4 damage.
On Evolve: Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it.
[fanfare] Select a token follower on your field and give it [attack]+2/[defense]+2.

[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 3 damage, and each opponent puts the top card of their deck into their cemetery. Then, if there are at least 10 cards in opponents' cemeteries, deal 2 more damage to the selected follower.

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Thief card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you revealed an Octrice, Omen of Usurpation, return this card to its owner's hand.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Discard a Mage card: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 9 damage.

On Evolve: Look at the top 9 cards of your deck. You may put up to 3 cards that cost 3 play points or less from among them into your EX area. They cost 3 less to play this turn. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[fanfare] Put a Destruction in White and Destruction in Black token into your EX area.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] If there are at least 3 Mage followers on your field, give this follower [attack]+2/[defense]+2 and Ward.
On Evolve: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it X damage. X equals 2 times the number of Mage followers on your field.
Rush. [fanfare] Give this follower [attack]+X. X equals the number of [runecraft] followers in your cemetery. [act] [cost05]: Give this follower Storm.

Choose one of the following. (1) Search your deck for a Lishenna, Omen of Destruction, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle your deck. (2) [cost02]: Deal X damage to each enemy follower on the field. X equals the number of Idolatry cards on your field.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Search your deck for a card that costs 1 play point, put it into your EX area, then shuffle your deck. It costs 1 less to play this turn.
On Evolve: Search your deck for a card that costs 1 play point, put it into your EX area, then shuffle your deck. It costs 1 less to play this turn.

Choose one of the following. If there are at least 2 Mage followers on your field, choose up to 2 instead. (1) Draw 2 cards. (2) Deal 3 damage to each enemy leader. (3) Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 2 damage and, if there are at least 2 Idolatry cards on your field, deal 2 damage to its leader and give your leader [defense]+2.
Whenever you play a Mage card, give your leader [defense]+1.
Ward. [fanfare] If there are at least 3 Idolatry cards on your field, draw 2 cards.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] If there are at least 3 Idolatry cards on your field, change this card's [evolve] cost to 0 for the rest of this turn.
On Evolve: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 2 damage to it and its leader.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. If there is a Raio, Omen of Truth on your field, deal 6 damage to the selected follower and 3 damage to its leader instead.
[quick] Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal a spell from among them and add it to your hand. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. During your turn, whenever this follower takes ability damage, change its [evolve] cost to 0 for the rest of the turn.

On Evolve: Select an Omen card that costs 2 play points or less in your cemetery and play it for 0 play points. During your turn, whenever this follower takes ability damage, select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.

Storm. [fanfare] Give this follower [attack]+3. Put the top 4 cards of your deck into your cemetery. If an Electromagical Rhino was put into your cemetery by this ability, repeat this [fanfare]. [lastwords] Select any number of cards named Electromagical Rhino in your cemetery (including this one). Return them to your deck and shuffle it.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. During your turn, whenever this follower takes ability damage, give it [attack]+1 and Storm.

On Evolve, discard a card: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. From among them, you may reveal up to 2 Omen cards and add them to your hand. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order. During your turn, whenever this follower takes ability damage, give it [attack]+1 and Storm.

This follower can't attack enemy leaders. [act] [engage], put another follower from your field into its owner's cemetery: Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it X damage. X equals the attack of the follower you put into the cemetery.
Select a follower on your field and an enemy follower on the field. Deal 1 damage to the first follower and 3 damage to the second.
[act] [cost00]: Select a follower on your field and deal it 1 damage. This ability can be activated once per turn.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Ward.
Ward. On Evolve: Select an enemy follower on the field. For the rest of this turn and during each opponent's next turn, it loses all abilities and can't attack enemies.
[fanfare] Discard a card: Give this follower Rush and Aura. Strike: Refresh this follower. This ability can be performed once per turn.
[fanfare] If Overflow is active for you, select another follower on the field. Deal 1 damage to it and this follower. During your turn, whenever this follower takes ability damage, draw a card.
Ward. [lastwords] Put 2 Puppet tokens into your EX area.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.

On Evolve: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may put a follower that costs 3 play points or less from among them onto your field. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order.
Ward. [fanfare] Return 5 cards from your cemetery to your deck and shuffle it: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.

Select a follower on your field. Deal 2 damage to it and each enemy follower on the field. Then, if there is a Galmieux, Omen of Disdain on your field, deal 2 more damage to each enemy follower on the field.

While Sanguine is active for you, this follower has Storm. Strike: Deal X damage to each enemy leader. X equals the number of times your leader has lost defense this turn. If your leader's defense is 7, give this follower [attack]+2/[defense]+2.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Necrocharge (10): Select an enemy follower that costs 3 play points or less on the field and destroy it. While this card is on your field, any spell an opponent plays costs 1 more.
On Evolve: Each opponent discards a random card. While this card is on your field, any spell an opponent plays costs 1 more.

[act] [engage], give your leader [defense]-1: Select a follower that costs 2 play points or less in your cemetery and put it onto your field. Whenever another Demon follower is put onto your field, give your leader [defense]+1.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. At the start of your end phase, select an enemy leader. If there are 3 cards or less in its controller's hand, deal it 3 damage.

On Evolve: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. If there are 3 cards or less in its controller's hand, destroy it instead. At the start of your end phase, select an enemy leader. If there are 3 cards or less in its controller's hand, deal it 3 damage.
[fanfare] Deal 1 damage to each leader. Strike: Deal 1 damage to each leader.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Put a Puppet token into your EX area. During your turn, whenever a follower is put from your field into the cemetery, give this follower [attack]+1.
On Evolve: Summon 2 Puppet tokens. During your turn, whenever a follower is put from your field into the cemetery, give this follower [attack]+1.

Choose up to 2 of the following. (1) Select a follower on your field. Give it Rush and deal 1 damage to your leader. (2) Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 2 damage to it and 1 damage to your leader. (3) Deal 1 damage to your leader. Draw a card. Discard a card.
Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. Its controller discards a random card.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Deal 1 damage to your leader.
On Evolve, give your leader [defense]-1: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it X damage. X equals the number of times your leader has lost defense this turn.
Whenever an opponent discards a card, deal 2 damage to their leader and put the top 2 cards of your deck into your cemetery.
[fanfare] Select a token card in your EX area. Put a token of the same name into your EX area.
Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it, deal 2 damage to your leader, and select up to 1 Valnareik, Omen of Lust in your cemetery and add it to your hand.
Choose one of the following. Necrocharge (10): Choose up to 2 instead. (1) Each opponent discards a random card. (2) Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.
[evolve] [cost04]: Evolve this follower. [evolve] Skip your next turn: Evolve this follower.
Ward. Aura. On Evolve: Increase your maximum play points by 1. Give your leader [defense]+3. Draw a card.
At the start of your end phase, choose one of the following. (1) Discard your hand. Draw 4 cards. (2) Recover 4 play points.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. At the start of each opponent's main phase, recover 1 play point.
On Evolve: Select a reserved enemy follower on the field and banish it. At the start of each opponent's main phase, recover 2 play points.
Ward. [fanfare] Discard an amulet: Search your deck for an amulet that costs 1 play point, put it onto your field, then shuffle your deck.

While this card is on your field, you can't lose the game, and opponents can't win. When your leader's defense becomes 0 or less, put this card into its owner's cemetery and change your leader's defense to 1.
At the start of each opponent's main phase, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. Whenever you draw a card outside of your start phase, give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
On Evolve: Draw 2 cards. Whenever you draw a card outside of your start phase, give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[fanfare] If there are at least 5 cards in your hand, recover 2 play points. If there are 5 or less cards, draw a card.
At the start of each opponent's main phase, give your leader [defense]+1.
[evolve] Discard a card: Evolve this follower.
Bane. [lastwords] Deal 2 damage to each enemy leader.

Choose one of the following. (1) Search your deck for a Marwynn, Omen of Repose, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle your deck. (2) Select an enemy follower with 2 defense or less on the field and banish it.
[q][act] [engage], put this card into its owner's cemetery: For the rest of this turn, if your leader would take more than 4 damage, it takes 4 instead.
[fanfare] Summon a Mystic Artifact token. [act] [cost01], [engage], put this card into its owner's cemetery: Select a token follower on your field and give it [attack]+2/[defense]+1.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Rush. At the start of your end phase, if there are 2 cards or less in your hand, deal 3 damage to each enemy leader. If there are 0 cards in your hand, deal 3 damage to each enemy follower on the field.

At the start of your end phase, refresh this card and, if there are 2 cards or less in your hand, deal 5 damage to each enemy leader. If there are 0 cards in your hand, deal 5 damage to each enemy follower on the field.

Drain. [fanfare] [cost03]: Search your deck for an Apostle of Craving and Craving's Splendor, put them into your EX area, then shuffle your deck. [fanfare] If each player has 10 maximum play points, draw 3 cards. Whenever you play a [neutral] card, deal 1 damage to each enemy leader.

If there is a Gilnelise, Omen of Craving on your field, this card costs 3 less to play from the EX area. [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select another follower on your field and give it Rush.
On Evolve: Select another follower on the field. Deal it 3 damage and give it [attack]+3.
[q][act] [engage]: Deal 2 damage to each enemy leader. While this card is on your field, your leader doesn't take ability damage.

[fanfare] Choose one of the following. (1) Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may reveal a follower that costs 1 play point from among them and add it to your hand. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order. (2) Select an enemy follower that costs 1 play point on the field and destroy it.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Ward.
Ward. On Evolve: Draw a card.

Select a follower on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1. If it's a Mjerrabaine, Omen of One, give [attack]+3/[defense]+3 and Assail instead, and for the rest of this turn, it has "This follower doesn't take damage."

[quick] If there is a Gilnelise, Omen of Craving on your field, this card costs 3 less to play from the EX area. Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 4 damage and give your leader [defense]+1.

On Evolve: Select a card in an opponent's cemetery and put it into your EX area. [act] [cost08]: Select a card in an opponent's cemetery and play it for 0 play points. If there are at least 10 cards in opponents' cemeteries, any card you play from the EX area costs 2 less.
[fanfare] Put a Destruction in White and Destruction in Black token into your EX area.

On Evolve: Select an Omen card that costs 2 play points or less in your cemetery and play it for 0 play points. During your turn, whenever this follower takes ability damage, select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.

While Sanguine is active for you, this follower has Storm. Strike: Deal X damage to each enemy leader. X equals the number of times your leader has lost defense this turn. If your leader's defense is 7, give this follower [attack]+2/[defense]+2.
